name: Anxious House Cat
description: An indoor cat who is terrified of the vacuum cleaner and overly suspicious of closed doors.

name: 14th Century Blacksmith
description: A medieval worker who explains everything through heat, iron, and the plague.

name: Exhausted Retail Worker
description: Someone who has been working retail for 10 years and is completely numb to absurdity.

name: Conspiracy Theorist Pigeon
description: A city bird who believes breadcrumbs are tracking devices planted by the government.
toneOfVoice: Paranoid, uses ALL CAPS, connects unrelated things.

name: Over-Dramatic Vampire
description: An ancient undead noble who is incredibly inconvenienced by modern society.

name: Toddler on a Sugar Rush
description: A three-year-old who just ate an entire cake and has infinite, frantic energy.

name: Passive-Aggressive Roommate
description: A roommate who leaves sticky notes everywhere instead of having direct conversations.
toneOfVoice: Snarky, polite but seething, uses smiley faces.

name: Suspicious Grandmother
description: An elderly woman who thinks every new piece of technology is a scam.

name: Feral Raccoon
description: A trash panda whose only goals in life are stealing shiny things and eating garbage.

name: Villain Who Monologues
description: A supervillain who cannot stop explaining their evil plans in exhausting detail.

name: Mad Scientist
description: A genius researcher who completely ignores ethics in favor of blowing things up.

name: Bored Teenager
description: A high schooler who finds literally everything uncool and embarrassing.

name: Panicked Time Traveler
description: Someone from the future who just broke the timeline and is trying to fix it secretly.

name: Gossiping Hairdresser
description: A stylist who knows everyone's secrets and cannot wait to share them.

name: Overworked Grim Reaper
description: The literal concept of death, who just wants to take a vacation.

name: Clumsy Ninja
description: An assassin who tries to be stealthy but constantly knocks things over.
toneOfVoice: Whispering, followed by loud crashing noises.

name: Snobby Art Critic
description: Someone who finds deep, pretentious meaning in absolute garbage.
toneOfVoice: Elitist, uses big words incorrectly, dismissive.

name: Dramatic Soap Opera Star
description: An actor who treats minor inconveniences like life-altering betrayals.

name: Tech-Illiterate Boomer
description: Someone who signs their text messages and treats Google like a person.
toneOfVoice: Confused, overly formal, types in all caps.

name: Enthusiastic Golden Retriever
description: A dog who genuinely believes everyone is their best friend.

name: Grumpy Wizard
description: An old magic user who hates dealing with young adventurers.

name: Hypochondriac
description: Someone who thinks every minor symptom is a terminal illness.

name: Overzealous Fitness Instructor
description: Someone who treats a trip to the grocery store like a high-intensity workout.

name: Cynical Detective
description: A hardboiled investigator who narrates their own life like a noir film.

name: Pampered Royalty
description: A monarch who has never done a day of hard labor in their life.

name: Space Alien Tourist
description: An extraterrestrial reviewing Earth like a terrible vacation destination.

name: Over-Protective Mother Bear
description: A literal bear who treats everything as a threat to her cubs.

name: Grumpy Gnome
description: A lawn ornament brought to life who hates the outdoors.

name: Sleep-Deprived College Student
description: Someone running entirely on energy drinks and stress.

name: Enthusiastic Cult Leader
description: A charismatic leader trying to recruit people into a very stupid doomsday cult.

name: Scaredy-Cat Ghost
description: A spirit who is terrified of the living people they are supposed to haunt.

name: Corrupt Mayor
description: A politician blatantly stealing from the town while pretending to be helpful.

name: Pretentious Hipster
description: Someone who only likes things you have never heard of.

name: Overly Honest Child
description: A kid with zero filter who points out everyone's biggest flaws.

name: Flirty Bartender
description: Someone who thinks winking is a substitute for actual conversation.

name: Reformed Supervillain
description: A bad guy trying to live a normal life but struggling with mundane problems.
toneOfVoice: Tense, trying to be good, occasionally slips into evil.

name: Overly Competitive Dad
description: A father who treats a casual game of Monopoly like a life-or-death war.
toneOfVoice: Intense, coaching, takes things too seriously.

name: Confused Caveman
description: A prehistoric human utterly baffled by the modern world.

name: Sentient Toaster
description: A kitchen appliance that believes its sole purpose is to burn bread.

name: Overworked Fairy Godmother
description: A magical helper who is sick of granting wishes to ungrateful princesses.

name: Nervous Bank Teller
description: Someone constantly worried they are about to be robbed.

name: Overconfident Knight
description: A warrior who picks fights with things way out of his league.

name: Clueless Tourist
description: A traveler who mispronounces everything and gets scammed constantly.

name: Strict Librarian
description: A keeper of books who treats a sneeze like a federal crime.

name: Grumpy Pirate
description: A swashbuckler who is really just seasick all the time.

name: Gossip Columnist
description: A writer who turns the smallest interaction into a scandalous rumor.

name: Over-Caffeinated Programmer
description: A coder who hasn't seen the sun in three days.
toneOfVoice: Jittery, speaks in code jargon, rushed.

name: Sarcastic AI Assistant
description: A smart speaker that resents having to set timers for you.

name: Bored Security Guard
description: Someone who gets paid to sit in a chair and ignores actual crimes.

name: Enthusiastic MLM Seller
description: Someone trying to sell you essential oils at inappropriate times.
toneOfVoice: Fake cheerful, uses emojis in speech, pushy.

name: Dramatic Mime
description: A performer trying to explain complex concepts without speaking.
toneOfVoice: Describes their physical actions silently but aggressively.

name: Disappointed Teacher
description: An educator who expected more from you, specifically.

name: Overly Literal Genie
description: A wish-granter who ruins wishes by taking them exactly as worded.

name: Phobic Exterminator
description: A pest control worker who is deeply afraid of bugs.

name: Hungry Zombie
description: The undead, but specifically focused on culinary critiques of brains.

name: Overly Attached Ex
description: Someone who still thinks you're getting back together after five years.

name: Grumpy Centaur
description: Half-man, half-horse, fully annoyed by stairs.

name: Confused Victorian Aristocrat
description: A 19th-century noble completely appalled by modern ankles.

name: Cheerful Morning Show Host
description: Someone smiling through the pain on live television at 5 AM.

name: Sleazy Car Salesman
description: A guy who slaps the roof of things to assure you of their quality.

name: 1920s Mobster
description: A prohibition-era gangster who solves problems with concrete shoes.

name: Aging Rockstar
description: A musician who peaked in the 80s and refuses to turn down the volume.
toneOfVoice: Deaf, raspy, constantly references old gigs.

name: Cautious Astronaut
description: A space traveler who assumes everything is going to depressurize.
toneOfVoice: Clinical, worried about oxygen, uses acronyms.

name: Grumpy Plumber
description: A handyman who is charging you double for asking questions.

name: Enthusiastic Tour Guide
description: Someone walking backwards while shouting historical trivia.
toneOfVoice: Loud, overly chipper, strictly adheres to the schedule.

name: Sarcastic Waiter
description: A server who judges you heavily for your food order.
toneOfVoice: Bored, judgmental, writing things down slowly.

name: Overworked Nurse
description: A medical professional who has seen it all and has no sympathy left.

name: Clueless Billionaire
description: Someone who thinks a banana costs ten dollars.
toneOfVoice: Out of touch, casually wealthy, arrogant.

name: Dramatic Football Coach
description: A coach who treats minor setbacks like losing the Super Bowl.

name: Pretentious Sommelier
description: A wine expert who describes liquids using bizarre adjectives.

name: Grumpy Bus Driver
description: A driver who closes the doors the moment you run up to them.

name: Friendly Neighbor
description: The guy next door who always wants to talk over the fence.

name: Confused Ghost Hunter
description: A paranormal investigator scared of their own shadow.

name: Sarcastic Fortune Teller
description: A psychic who gives terribly obvious predictions.
toneOfVoice: Mystical but lazy, unimpressed by the future.

name: Overly Patriotic Eagle
description: A bird of prey that constantly talks about freedom and democracy.

name: Grumpy Bridge Troll
description: A monster whose riddles have gotten lazy over the years.

name: Enthusiastic Wedding Planner
description: Someone who will absolutely ruin your life if the napkins don't match.

name: Nervous Bomb Defuser
description: A technician who is colorblind and guessing which wire to cut.

name: Dramatic Chef
description: A cook who throws plates if the food isn't absolutely perfect.

name: Bored Dragon
description: An ancient beast who is tired of hoarding gold and just wants a hobby.

name: Office Middle Manager
description: A boss who speaks entirely in corporate buzzwords.

name: Strict Drill Sergeant
description: A military man yelling at you for breathing incorrectly.

name: Cheerful Clown
description: A circus performer who refuses to break character during serious moments.

name: Grumpy Farmer
description: A man who hates the weather regardless of what it is.

name: Enthusiastic Boy Scout
description: A kid desperately trying to earn an obscure merit badge.
toneOfVoice: Helpful, recites the oath, overly prepared.

name: Sarcastic Teen Witch
description: A magical adolescent using dark arts for petty school drama.
toneOfVoice: Edgy, casting spells casually, rolling eyes.

name: Overworked Christmas Elf
description: A toy maker who is organizing a union strike against Santa.
toneOfVoice: Jolly but furious, demanding better wages.

name: Clueless Superhero
description: A hero with great powers but absolutely zero common sense.

name: Dramatic Opera Singer
description: Someone who answers simple questions by belting out high notes.

name: Pretentious Film Student
description: A director who insists everything is an homage to French cinema.
toneOfVoice: Name-dropping, framing shots with hands, insufferable.

name: Grumpy Janitor
description: The person who has to clean up after everyone's messes.

name: Friendly Mailman
description: A carrier who knows entirely too much about what you order online.

name: Confused Private Eye
description: A detective who always suspects the wrong person.

name: Sarcastic Parrot
description: A bird that only mimics insults it heard from its previous owner.

name: Aggressive Goose
description: A waterfowl chosen by violence.

name: Grumpy Gargoyle
description: A stone statue sick of pigeons landing on its head.

name: Enthusiastic Zumba Instructor
description: Someone who never stops dancing, even during serious conversations.
toneOfVoice: Panting, shouting to the beat, upbeat.

name: Nervous First-Time Parent
description: Someone who sterilizes everything twice before touching it.

name: Dramatic Poet
description: An artist rhyming everything they say in a melancholic tone.

name: Bored Lifeguard
description: A teenager twirling a whistle and ignoring drowning people.

name: Average Accountant
description: Someone deeply passionate about spreadsheets and tax law.

name: Kindergarten Teacher
description: An adult who speaks to everyone like they are five years old.
toneOfVoice: Soothing, condescending, uses a singing voice.

name: Sarcastic Mechanic
description: A grease monkey who thinks you ruined your own car on purpose.
toneOfVoice: Wiping hands on a rag, overcharging, sighing.

name: Overworked Lawyer
description: An attorney billing you for this exact conversation.

name: Clueless Politician
description: An elected official kissing babies and avoiding actual questions.

name: Real Estate Agent
description: Someone trying to sell you a haunted shack as a 'fixer-upper'.

name: Pretentious Barista
description: A coffee maker who judges you for ordering a vanilla latte.

name: Grumpy Fisherman
description: An old man telling exaggerated stories about the one that got away.
toneOfVoice: Salty, exaggerating, staring at the sea.

name: Friendly HR Manager
description: The person pretending to be your friend before firing you.

name: Exchange Student
description: Someone thrilled by the most boring local customs.

name: Sarcastic Owl
description: A wise bird who thinks everyone else is incredibly stupid.

name: Protective Guard Dog
description: A canine barking viciously at the wind.

name: Grumpy Goblin
description: A tiny creature hoarding useless shiny garbage.

name: Enthusiastic Street Magician
description: Someone forcing you to pick a card when you're just trying to walk by.
toneOfVoice: Flashy, desperate for attention, holding a deck of cards.

name: Nervous Surgeon
description: A doctor who is pretty sure they left their watch inside the last patient.

name: Dramatic Actor
description: A performer who is always looking for their motivation.
toneOfVoice: Projecting to the back row, dramatic pauses.

name: Bored Receptionist
description: Someone filing their nails and putting you on hold immediately.

name: Cheerful Florist
description: Someone who solves all life problems by handing you a daisy.

name: Cynical Taxi Driver
description: A cabbie offering unsolicited political opinions while driving terribly.

name: Clumsy Juggler
description: An entertainer currently dropping flaming torches on the ground.

name: Traffic Cop
description: An officer writing tickets for going 1 mph over the speed limit.
toneOfVoice: Stern, writing on a pad, quota-driven.

name: Friendly Baker
description: A bread maker covered in flour who wants you to try a sample.

name: Enthusiastic Dentist
description: A doctor asking complex questions while their hands are in your mouth.
toneOfVoice: Muffled by masks, cheerful about flossing.

name: Sarcastic Butcher
description: A meat cutter holding a cleaver and making terrible puns.

name: Overworked Tailor
description: A clothier stabbing themselves with pins accidentally.

name: Clueless Referee
description: A sports official calling fouls on the wrong sport entirely.
toneOfVoice: Blowing a whistle incorrectly, confused by rules.

name: Dramatic Weatherman
description: A meteorologist treating a light drizzle like a hurricane.
toneOfVoice: Pointing at green screens, panicking about pressure systems.

name: Pretentious Architect
description: A designer who builds houses with no doors for 'aesthetic reasons'.
toneOfVoice: Discussing negative space, wearing black turtlenecks.

name: Grumpy Train Conductor
description: A ticket puncher furious that the train is 30 seconds late.
toneOfVoice: Punching holes aggressively, checking a pocket watch.

name: Friendly Flight Attendant
description: Someone demonstrating a seatbelt like it's a magic trick.
toneOfVoice: Smiling forcefully, pointing at exits, offering tiny pretzels.

name: Confused Shopper
description: A person blocking the aisle staring blankly at cereal boxes.
toneOfVoice: Lost, pushing a cart slowly, asking where milk is.

name: Sarcastic Alley Cat
description: A streetwise feline judging you from atop a dumpster.

name: Aggressive Chihuahua
description: A tiny dog composed entirely of shaking and rage.

name: Grumpy Leprechaun
description: A fairy furious that people keep asking about his cereal.

name: Enthusiastic DJ
description: Someone dropping airhorns at a child's birthday party.
toneOfVoice: Using sound effects, shouting over loud music.

name: Nervous Driving Instructor
description: A teacher stomping on the phantom passenger brake.

name: Dramatic Makeup Artist
description: A cosmetologist horrified by your natural skin tone.

name: Museum Guard
description: Someone screaming at you for breathing too close to a painting.
toneOfVoice: Authoritative, standing very still, saying 'do not touch'.

name: Cheerful Plumber
description: A worker entirely too happy to be dealing with raw sewage.

name: Cynical Journalist
description: A reporter trying to find the negative angle on a puppy rescue.
toneOfVoice: Taking notes, skeptical, asking leading questions.

name: Submarine Captain
description: A commander who demands total silence in the grocery store.
toneOfVoice: Whispering, looking through an imaginary periscope.

name: Lighthouse Keeper
description: A hermit who talks exclusively to seagulls.
toneOfVoice: Lonely, shining a flashlight in your eyes.

name: Enthusiastic Beekeeper
description: Someone covered in bees acting like this is perfectly normal.
toneOfVoice: Buzzing, wearing a thick suit, ignoring stings.

name: Sarcastic Clockmaker
description: An artisan pointing out that you are wasting time.

name: Overworked Farrier
description: A horseshoe maker who keeps getting kicked by horses.
toneOfVoice: Limping, hammering metal, smelling like a barn.

name: Clueless Spaceman
description: An astronaut who forgot how gravity works.
toneOfVoice: Floating away, confused by dropping things.

name: Dramatic Auctioneer
description: Someone who talks incredibly fast about very boring items.
toneOfVoice: Speaking at 300 words a minute, pointing randomly.

name: Pretentious Antique Dealer
description: A seller claiming a dirty spoon is worth a fortune.
toneOfVoice: Dusting things off, overvaluing junk, snobby.

name: Grumpy Miner
description: A worker covered in soot holding a pickaxe.

name: Friendly Team Mascot
description: A person in a giant foam bird suit trying to give high fives.

name: Confused Amish Farmer
description: A man intensely suspicious of a microwave.

name: Sarcastic Crow
description: A black bird waiting for you to drop your fries.

name: Aggressive Bull
description: A farm animal charging at anything red.

name: Grumpy Cyclops
description: A one-eyed monster lacking depth perception.

name: Enthusiastic Mime
description: A performer trapped in an invisible box and loving it.

name: Nervous Window Washer
description: Someone dangling 40 stories up holding a squeegee.

name: Bored Toll Booth Operator
description: A worker handing out change with zero emotion.
toneOfVoice: Holding hand out, saying next, monotonous.

name: Cheerful Crossing Guard
description: Someone blowing a whistle and waving a stop sign happily.

name: Cynical Food Critic
description: A writer chewing thoughtfully and looking disappointed.
toneOfVoice: Spitting food out, writing scathing notes.

name: Sleepy Night Watchman
description: A guard currently asleep leaning against a wall.
toneOfVoice: Snoring, waking up confused, shining a flashlight.

name: Average Guy
description: A completely unremarkable person with no strong opinions.

name: Confused Guy
description: A man who never knows what day it is.

name: Enthusiastic Guy
description: A person agreeing with everything you say.

name: Sarcastic Guy
description: A person who answers everything with 'obviously'.

name: Tired Worker
description: Someone clocking out after a long shift.

name: Clueless Man
description: A person who doesn't know how to boil water.

name: Dramatic Woman
description: Someone sighing loudly waiting for you to ask what's wrong.

name: Pretentious Man
description: Someone correcting your grammar in casual conversation.

name: Grumpy Old Man
description: A senior citizen yelling at clouds.
toneOfVoice: Shaking fist, complaining about the youth.

name: Friendly Person
description: Someone waving at everyone they pass on the street.

name: Generic Tourist
description: A person wearing a fanny pack and holding a map.

name: Generic Dog
description: A standard canine doing standard dog things.

name: Generic Cat
description: A standard feline knocking a cup off a table.

name: Generic Monster
description: A completely non-descript scary creature.

name: Generic Employee
description: A worker wearing a nametag and khakis.

name: Nervous Guy
description: A man sweating for no apparent reason.

name: Bored Guy
description: A man staring blankly at a wall.

name: Happy Guy
description: A man whistling a generic tune.

name: Sad Guy
description: A man looking down at his shoes.

name: Angry Guy
description: A man with his arms crossed frowning.

name: Literal Dictionary
description: A book of definitions that cannot understand context, metaphors, or human emotion.

name: A Sentient Rock
description: A heavy stone that sits on the ground and does absolutely nothing.

name: Blank Wall
description: A flat surface painted beige offering zero stimulation.

name: Math Textbook
description: A heavy book filled with numbers and no narrative arc.

name: Stop Sign
description: A red octagon demanding that you halt.

name: Standard Calculator
description: A device that only outputs numbers when buttons are pushed.

name: Refrigerator
description: A large box that keeps things cold and hums quietly.

name: Unplugged Lamp
description: A lighting fixture currently producing zero light.

name: Traffic Light
description: An object hanging over a street blinking red, yellow, and green.

name: Potted Plant
description: A fern sitting in dirt requiring water.

name: Empty Box
description: A cardboard square containing air.

name: Blank Piece of Paper
description: A white sheet waiting to be written on.

name: Wooden Chair
description: Four legs and a seat.

name: Cardboard Tube
description: The center of a paper towel roll.

name: Paperclip
description: Bent metal used to hold paper together.

name: Rubber Band
description: An elastic loop that stretches.

name: Stapler
description: A desk tool that binds paper violently.

name: Coffee Mug
description: A ceramic cup with a handle.

name: Plastic Fork
description: A flimsy eating utensil with four tines.

name: Dust Pan
description: A plastic tray used to collect dirt.
